content: I will update the task checklist in `task.md` to mark all items as fully completed.

args.Description: "Mark all task items as completed in task.md"
args.Instruction: "Mark all task list items as completed"
args.ReplacementContent:
"- [x] Install AWS S3 SDK for Cloudflare R2 integration
- [x] Create database migration script `03_create_website_pooja_products.sql`
- [x] Update `src/types/index.ts` to support `PoojaProduct` schema
- [x] Create Cloudflare R2 upload helper `r2.ts`
- [x] Create reusable `InlineEdit.tsx` component
- [x] Update `ProductCard.tsx` to support edit mode and R2 image overlays
- [x] Update `ProductDetailPage.tsx` to support edit mode, inline sections, and dynamic list mutations (Vedic steps, Samagri, FAQs, certificates)
- [x] Implement visual workspace in `AdminPanelPage.tsx` with a control toolbar
- [x] Verify build compiles successfully without compilation errors
- [x] Implement bulletproof phone formatting and fail-safe database network exception handling for devotee OTP authentication
- [x] Create a "Select Draft Template" button and preset drafts selector dropdown inside the Visual Builder Workspace
- [x] Integrate catalog list selection checkboxes, a Select All header, and a Publish Selected bulk action button
- [x] Fetch, structure-map, and display live published database products dynamically in the storefront catalog (App.tsx)
- [x] Fix image rendering bug by conditionally rendering img tags for R2 URL assets instead of raw text spans across all storefront components
- [x] Resolve visual rendering, glassmorphic visibility, and contrast issues by defining missing CSS variables, glass container styling, and primary button classes in `index.css`
- [x] Define dynamic category and product slugification resolver helper utilities
- [x] Rewrite navigation handler `setCurrentPage` in `App.tsx` to support page options and History pushState
- [x] Map active category dropdown items and `handleViewDetails` triggers to call `setCurrentPage` with options
- [x] Build popstate window event listener and fetch triggers for direct deep-linking on mount
- [x] Verify build compiles successfully with no TypeScript type warnings
- [x] Create SQL database migration script `04_add_customizable_specs_and_icons.sql` t
<truncated 746 bytes>
